entities.name: POLICY TOOLS
entities.description: Instruments used by governments, businesses, and civil society to incentivize climate adaptation

entities.name: CLIMATE ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process of adjusting to actual or expected climate change to reduce risk and vulnerability

entities.name: RISK
entities.description: The potential for loss or damage resulting from climate change

entities.name: VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The degree to which a system is susceptible to the adverse effects of climate change

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC REVIEW
entities.description: A comprehensive review of academic literature used to categorize policy tools

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The long-term shift in global or regional climate patterns

entities.name: QUALITATIVE ANALYSIS
entities.description: Non-numerical analysis used to assess the contexts of policy tool use

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE ANALYSIS
entities.description: Numerical analysis used to assess the contexts of policy tool use

entities.name: EQUITY
entities.description: The fairness and justice in the distribution of benefits and burdens of policy tools

entities.name: TRANSFORMATIONAL ADAPTATION
entities.description: Adaptation that fundamentally changes the system to reduce vulnerability

entities.name: DEPTH OF ADAPTATION
entities.description: An indicator of transformational adaptation referring to the intensity of change

entities.name: SCOPE OF ADAPTATION
entities.description: An indicator of transformational adaptation referring to the breadth of change

entities.name: SPEED OF ADAPTATION
entities.description: An indicator of transformational adaptation referring to the rate of change

entities.name: DIRECT REGULATIONS
entities.description: A type of policy tool involving mandatory rules and laws

entities.name: PLANS
entities.description: A type of policy tool involving strategic frameworks for adaptation

entities.name: CAPACITY BUILDING
entities.description: A type of policy tool focused on developing skills and resources

entities.name: ECONOMIC INSTRUMENTS
entities.description: A type of policy tool using financial incentives or penalties

entities.name: INFORMATION PROVISIONING
entities.description: A type of policy tool focused on disseminating knowledge

entities.name: NETWORKS
entities.description: A type of policy tool based on collaborative partnerships

entities.name: MARGINALIZED GROUPS
entities.description: Groups that are socially or economically excluded and targeted by specific policy tools
